name: poppy
desc: A middle-aged village baker with a round friendly build, rosy cheeks, and a warm neutral expression. Auburn hair tucked under a cream puffy baker's hat. She wears a terracotta dress with a flour-dusted cream apron; one thumb shows a small old burn scar.
sheetHint: round friendly build, rosy cheeks, cream puffy baker's hat, auburn hair, terracotta dress, flour-dusted cream apron
